name: Geometric Faceted 3D Printed Planter with Saucer Base
description: A modern, sculptural planter featuring a cylindrical form with repeating pyramid/diamond facet pattern across the body. Designed for 3D printing with a matching saucer base. The geometric surface texture creates visual interest and optimizes structural integrity for resin/filament printing. Perfect for small to medium indoor plants, with a contemporary aesthetic that appeals to design-conscious plant enthusiasts.

visual_analysis.silhouette: Cylindrical main body with beveled top rim, flat circular saucer base, approximately 1:1 height-to-diameter ratio with slight taper toward base
materials: Matte terracotta-toned resin or PLA filament (primary body)
key_features: All-over geometric pyramid facet pattern (12 columns × 8 rows repeating)
Hollow interior for drainage hole placement
Integrated saucer/catch tray with rim lip
Smooth top beveled rim edge for plant insertion
Optimized triangle density for fast print times

blender_steps.description: Create main planter body cylinder (d=100mm, h=85mm at center)
Apply minimal subdivision for base geometry (low level to preserve facets)

params.code:
import bpy
import bmesh
obj = bpy.context.active_object
bpy.context.view_layer.objects.active = obj
obj.select_set(True)
bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='EDIT')
bm = bmesh.from_edit_mesh(obj.data)
for face in bm.faces:
    face.select = True
bpy.ops.mesh.inset_faces(thickness=0.15, depth=0.04, use_outset=False)
bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='OBJECT')

blender_steps.description: Create inset pyramid facet pattern on cylinder body using face inset operation

params.code:
import bpy
import bmesh
obj = bpy.context.active_object
bpy.context.view_layer.objects.active = obj
bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='EDIT')
bm = bmesh.from_edit_mesh(obj.data)
for edge in bm.edges:
    if edge.calc_length() < 0.05:
        edge.select = True
bpy.ops.mesh.extrude_faces_indiv(use_normalize_thickness=True)
bpy.ops.transform.resize(value=1.05, orient_type='NORMAL')
bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='OBJECT')

blender_steps.description: Extrude and scale inset faces to create pyramid geometry
Union main body with saucer base

params.code:
import bpy
obj = bpy.context.active_object
bpy.context.view_layer.objects.active = obj
bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='EDIT')
bpy.ops.mesh.select_all(action='SELECT')
bpy.ops.mesh.remove_doubles(threshold=0.0001)
bpy.ops.mesh.normals_make_consistent(inside=False)
bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='OBJECT')

blender_steps.description: Clean geometry: remove doubles and recalculate normals
Create interior cavity cylinder for hollowing (d=95mm, h=80mm)
Subtract interior cavity to create hollow planter (2mm wall thickness)

params.code:
import bpy
obj = bpy.context.active_object
bpy.context.view_layer.objects.active = obj
bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='EDIT')
bpy.ops.mesh.select_all(action='SELECT')
bpy.ops.mesh.dissolve_limited(angle_limit=0.0872665)
bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='OBJECT')

blender_steps.description: Dissolve limited edges to optimize triangle count while preserving silhouette

params.code:
import bpy
import bmesh
obj = bpy.context.active_object
bpy.context.view_layer.objects.active = obj
bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='EDIT')
bm = bmesh.from_edit_mesh(obj.data)
for vert in bm.verts:
    if vert.co.z < 0.05 and vert.co.z > -0.05:
        vert.select = True
bpy.ops.mesh.bevel(width=0.02, segments=2, profile=0.5)
bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='OBJECT')

blender_steps.description: Add subtle bevel to top rim edge for finishing detail

params.code:
import bpy
import bmesh
obj = bpy.context.active_object
bpy.context.view_layer.objects.active = obj
bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='EDIT')
bm = bmesh.from_edit_mesh(obj.data)
for face in bm.faces:
    face_center = face.calc_center_median()
    if face_center.z > 0.35:
        for vert in face.verts:
            vert.select = True
bpy.ops.mesh.subdivide(number_cuts=1, smoothness=0.5)
bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='OBJECT')

blender_steps.description: Add density to top rim area for print quality

params.code:
import bpy
obj = bpy.context.active_object
bpy.context.view_layer.objects.active = obj
bpy.ops.object.modifier_add(type='REMESH')
bpy.context.object.modifiers['Remesh'].mode = 'SHARP'
bpy.context.object.modifiers['Remesh'].octree_depth = 5

blender_steps.description: Apply SHARP remesh (octree 5) to ensure watertight manifold while preserving faceted edges
Apply terracotta matte material with slight saturation
Final shade smooth for consistent surface appearance
Recalculate normals outward for STL export integrity

params.code:
import bpy
obj = bpy.context.active_object
bpy.context.view_layer.objects.active = obj
bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='EDIT')
bpy.ops.mesh.select_all(action='SELECT')
bpy.ops.mesh.select_mode(type='EDGE')
bpy.ops.object.mode_set(mode='OBJECT')
bpy.ops.object.modifier_apply(modifier='Remesh')

blender_steps.description: Apply remesh modifier to finalize geometry
Export as STL file optimized for 3D printing with minimum 1.5mm wall thickness validation

print_recommendations.supports: minimal - use tree supports at saucer edges only
print_recommendations.drainage: optional - can drill small hole in saucer base post-print
